overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a neon-lit covered alleyway in Night City's red-light district and entering an adult toy shop. The environment features heavy red and cyan neon lighting, atmospheric fog, and detailed cyberpunk architecture with various NPCs populating the scene.

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a covered alleyway bathed in red neon light. Two NPCs sit on a bench to the right while the camera passes by illuminated posters on the left wall. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with metal roofing and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor leading to commercial establishments

events.description: approaching the entrance to the sex shop with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking down corridor toward shop entrance, passing various neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red and blue neon sign reading SEX SHOP
red neon sign with bicycle icon reading TOYS
illuminated poster for braindance product with purple lighting
doorway leading into brightly lit shop interior

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the corridor approaching a sex shop entrance marked by prominent neon signage. A pedestrian walks toward the camera from the opposite direction. The environment transitions from the covered walkway to the shop entrance area with various commercial signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult toy store interior with illuminated display cases

events.description: entering the sex shop from the alleyway into brightly lit interior
slowing to navigate around browsing NPCs and examine displays

agents.ego_description: browsing the shop interior, examining display cases and approaching the service counter

shop employee in yellow pants standing by illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The player enters the shop interior, transitioning from the red-lit alley to a space with cyan and white artificial lighting. Various NPCs browse the illuminated display cases containing merchandise. The camera moves past a holographic display and approaches the service counter at the back of the store.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a moody, red-lit alleyway into the brightly illuminated interior of a commercial shop. It begins by gliding through a covered corridor bathed in red neon, passing by NPCs on a bench and glowing posters under a metal roof amidst atmospheric fog. As the camera advances, the walkway opens up toward a storefront marked by prominent neon signage, momentarily crossing paths with an oncoming pedestrian. The scene then shifts abruptly from the red exterior to a sterile interior defined by cyan and white artificial lighting as the player enters the shop. Finally, the camera moves past holographic displays and browsing customers, pushing deeper into the store toward the service counter at the back.
